conbody.p: Overview: The CDS Productivity Summary Report displays the daily productivity KPIs in real time at facility level. Data in the tabular report is sorted by the CDS with the highest number of the Initial Reviews.

The report provides answers to the following business questions:
How is the overall performance of the CDS team in terms of review activity?
How is the performance of a specific CDS in terms of review activity?
How is the overall performance of the CDS team in terms of clarification activity?
How is the performance of a specific CDS in terms of clarification activity?
Who are my top three CDS performers in terms of the review rate
Navigation: On the Analytics home page left side panel, navigate to CDS General CDS Productivity CDS Productivity Summary .

The CDS Productivity Summary Report displays the following:
KPI Cards: Initial Reviews, Additional Reviews, Total Reviews, Avg Initial Review TAT (Hours)
Review Summary tabular chart
Clarification Summary tabular chart
On the top panel, you can select desired values for the slicers (refer ) and the corresponding data gets filtered in charts.
Default Display: By default, this dashboard displays data for inpatient encounters for which activity was performed by the CDS in the last 1 week.

entry.p: The Initial Review KPI card displays count of initial reviews performed in the selected activity date range.
Initial review date/time falls within the selected activity date range.
The initial review is created when you add the working DRG (Working DRG is populated the first time) and saves the encounter in CDE application.
The Additional Reviews KPI card displays count of additional reviews performed in the selected activity date range. Additional review date/time falls within the selected activity date range.

The additional review is created when you modify the encounter by doing the following and saves it:
Modifying the working review
Creating the possible Review
Modifying the possible Review
Creating the worksheet
Modifying the worksheet
Creating a note
Modifying a note
Changing the encounter Status
Creating a clarification
Modifying a clarification
Creating or modifying an encounter

row.entry: The Total Reviews KPI card displays the total reviews performed, i.e. sum of initial and additional reviews.

entry.p: The Average Initial Review TAT (Hours) KPI card displays average initial review turnaround time in hours.
Initial review TAT (Hours) for an encounter = Initial review date/time of the encounter – Admit date/time of the encounter in hours.
Total initial review TAT (Hours) for all the encounters = Total initial review TAT (Hours) for all the encounters reviewed within the selected activity date range.

Average initial review TAT (Hours) for all the encounters = Total initial review TAT (Hours) for all the encounters / Total number of initial reviews performed within the selected activity date range.

p.b: CDS Productivity Summary - Review Summary tabular chart

table.title: Review Summary Table Column and Description

row.entry: Displays the name of the activity CDS who performed at least one review (initial or additional) in the activity date range.

Displays the count of encounters reviewed by the CDS in the activity date range. In other words, count of encounters for which the CDS did any activity (initial review or additional review) in the activity date range.

entry.p: Displays the count of Initial Reviews performed by the CDS in the activity date range.

p.note: Count of Initial Reviews performed in the activity date range cannot be more than the count of Encounters Reviewed in that date range.

row.entry: Displays the count of additional Reviews performed by the CDS in the activity date range.
Displays the sum of initial and additional reviews performed by the CDS in the activity date range.

entry.p: Displays the percentage of reviewed encounters with at least one clarification with the status other than DELETED or RETRACTED in the selected activity date range.
This value is represented with 0 decimals. E.g. 30%.

ul.li: Initial Review Date/Time falls in the selected activity date range.
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range.
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.

entry.p: Encounter Clarification Rate= (The count of reviewed encounters with at least one clarification with the status other than DELETED or RETRACTED sent in the selected activity date range / Count of Initial Reviews performed in the selected activity date range) *100.
Displays the percentage of reviewed encounters with at least one Financial Impact Clarifications sent in the selected activity date range.
This value is represented with 0 decimals. E.g. 30%.

ul.li: Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial ’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded for this metric calculation.

entry.p: Financial Impact Clarification Rate = (Count of reviewed encounters with at least one Financial Impact clarification with the status other than DELETED or RETRACTED in the selected activity date range / Count of encounters with an initial review date in the selected activity date range) X 100.
Displays the average Initial Review TAT (Hours) for the CDS.
Initial Review TAT (Hours) for the encounter = (Admit Date/Time – Initial Review Date/Time) in hours

Avg. Initial Review TAT (Hours) for the CDS = Sum of ‘Initial Review TAT (Hours)’ of all the initial reviews performed by the CDS in the activity date range / Total Initial reviews performed by the CDS in the activity date range.

p.b: CDS Productivity Summary - Clarification Summary tabular chart

table.title: Clarification Summary Table Column and Description

row.entry: This column displays the name of the initiating CDS who sent at least one clarification in the activity date range.

entry.p: For each CDS, this column displays the count of clarifications with at least one instance sent in the activity date range.
Note: Instance Sent date falls in the activity date range.
This column displays the count of reviewed encounters for which the CDS sent at least one clarification with the status other than DELETED or RETRACTED in the activity date range.

row.entry: The count of reviewed encounters with at least one clarification with the status other than DELETED or RETRACTED.

For each CDS, this column displays the count of Financial Impact clarifications with at least one instance sent in the activity date range. Instance Sent date falls in the activity date range. Financial Impact Clarifications are the clarifications with a standard or custom type (Primary Type at Reconciliation) set-up as 'Financial' in the admin configuration.

entry.p:
Out of total clarifications sent, the % count of Financial Impact Clarifications sent.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial ’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

row.entry: %Financial Impact Clarification = (Count of clarifications with Financial Impact Clarification Type / Total Clarifications Sent) x 100

This column displays the count of encounters for which the CDS sent at least one instance for the Financial Impact Clarification in the activity date range.Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial or BOTH’ in the admin configuration is an Impact Clarification.
Encounters with Impact Clarification = Count of reviewed encounters with at least one financial impact clarification with the status other than DELETED or RETRACTED.

entry.p: Out of total Impact Clarifications Responded by the CDS in the selected activity date range, the percentage of Impact Clarifications Agreed.
Note: Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial’ in the admin configuration is an Impact Clarification.

row.entry: Impact Clarification Agreed Rate = (Out of Impact Clarifications Responded in the activity date range, count of impact clarifications with at least one agreed instance / Out of the Financial Impact Clarifications Sent by the CDS in the activity date range, count of impact clarifications with at least one responded instance (response other than Pending, Retracted, and No Response) in the activity date range) x 100

Out of total encounters reviewed by the CDS in the selected activity date range, the percentage of Encounters with SEV Clarifications. SEV Clarifications are the clarifications that have Primary Type at Reconciliation as SEV.

SEV Clarification Rate = (Count of encounters for which the CDS sent at least one instance for the SEV Clarification in the activity date range/ The count of Initial Reviews performed by the CDS in the activity date range) X 100
Displays the activity date range here. You can select required dates from the date lookup.

entry.p: Displays the admit date range here. You can select required dates from the date lookup.
Displays a list of active and inactive facilities that you have access to. The list is sorted alphabetically.
Format: Facility Description (Facility ID)
Displays a list of active and inactive payers associated with the facilities that you have access to. The list is sorted alphabetically.
Format: Payer Description (Payer ID)Unassigned Payer display encounters that do not have a payer assigned.

row.entry:
Displays following encounter status in alphabetical order:
Auto Reconciled
Discharged
In Progress
Ready to Reconcile
Reconciled Impact
Reconciled No Impact
Reconciliation Hold
Review Complete
Review Not Needed
Untouched

Displays unit in alphabetical order associated with the facilities that you have access.
Format: Unit Description (Unit ID)Unassigned Unit display encounters that do not have a unit assigned.

Displays both active and inactive CDSs in alphabetical order associated with the facilities that you have access.
Format: Last Name, First Name MI (CDS ID)Unassigned CDS display encounters that do not have a CDS assigned.
The filter displays the users with the CDS role assigned.

Displays the patient type, Inpatient or Outpatient.
By default, Inpatient is selected.

entry.p: (Count of reviewed encounters with at least one clarification with the status other than DELETED or RETRACTED sent in the selected activity date range/ Count of Initial Reviews performed in the selected activity date range) X 100. E.g. 33%.

row.entry: (Count of clarifications with at least one instance responded in the selected activity date range/Count of clarification with at least one instance sent in the selected activity date range) x 100. E.g. 80%

(Count of Clarifications with at least one agreed response in the selected activity date range /Count of clarifications with at least one instance responded in the selected activity date range) x 100. E.g. 90%
Financial Impact Clarifications: Clarifications with standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial’ in the admin configuration.

entry.p: (Count of reviewed encounters with at least one Financial Impact clarification (excludes DELETED or RETRACTED) sent in the selected activity date range/Count of encounters with an initial review date in the selected activity date range) x 100. E.g. 56%.

row.entry: (Count of Financial Impact clarification with at least one instance in the selected activity date range/Count of clarifications with at least one instance in the selected activity date range) x 100. E.g. 75%.

Count of Financial Impact clarifications with at least one instance responded in the selected activity date range/Count of Financial Impact clarifications with at least one instance sent in the selected activity date range) x 100. E.g. 75%.

(Count of Financial Impact Clarifications agreed in the selected activity date range/ Count of Financial Impact clarifications with at least one instance responded in the selected activity date range) x 100. E.g. 90%.
Quality Clarifications: Clarifications with standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Quality’ in the admin configuration.

(Count of reviewed encounters with at least one Quality Impact clarification (excludes DELETED or RETRACTED) sent in the selected activity date range/Count of encounters with an initial review date in the selected activity date range) x 100. E.g. 56%.

(Count of Quality Impact clarification with at least one instance in the selected activity date range/Count of clarifications with at least one instance in the selected activity date range) x 100. E.g. 44%.

(Count of Quality Impact clarifications with at least one instance responded in the selected activity date range/Count of Quality Impact clarifications with at least one instance sent in the selected activity date range) x 100. E.g. 88%.

(Count of Quality Impact Clarifications agreed in the selected activity date range/Count of Quality Impact clarifications with at least one instance responded in the selected activity date range) x 100. E.g. 100%.
Both Impact Clarifications: Clarifications with standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as 'Financial' and ‘Quality’ in the admin configuration.

(Count of Both Impact clarification with at least one instance in the selected activity date range/Count of clarifications with at least one instance in the selected activity date range) x 100. E.g. 31%.

(Count of Both Impact clarifications with at least one instance responded in the selected activity date range/Count of Both Impact clarifications with at least one instance sent in the selected activity date range) x 100. E.g. 91%.

(Count of Both Impact Clarifications agreed in the selected activity date range/Count of Both Impact clarifications with at least one instance responded in the selected activity date range) x 100. E.g. 95%.
SEV Clarifications: Clarifications with ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ as SEV.

(Count of reviewed encounters with at least one SEV Impact clarification (excludes DELETED or RETRACTED) sent in the selected activity date range/Count of encounters with an initial review date in the selected activity date range) x 100. E.g. 31%.

(Count of SEV Impact clarification with at least one instance in the selected activity date range/Count of clarifications with at least one instance in the selected activity date range) x 100. E.g. 21%.

(Count of SEV Impact clarifications with at least one instance responded in the selected activity date range/Count of SEV Impact clarifications with at least one instance sent in the selected activity date range) x 100. E.g. 70%.

(Count of SEV Impact Clarifications agreed in the selected activity date range /Count of SEV Impact clarifications with at least one instance responded in the selected activity date range) x 100. E.g. 98%.
